title: Plate Filling Heat Inactivated Covid Samples for PCR - Part 2
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps a 96 well plate by transferring 6ul from a source plate deepwell plate to a destination deepwell plate. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Specify the number of samples (1-94) to run on this protocol. Note: samples will be picked by row in the tube racks, in order of slots 7, 8, 10, and 11. * `P20 Mount`: Specify which side to mount your P20 Multi Channel Pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol preps a 96 well plate by transferring 6ul from a source plate deepwell plate to a destination deepwell plate. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Specify the number of samples (1-94) to run on this protocol. Note: samples will be picked by row in the tube racks, in order of slots 7, 8, 10, and 11. * `P20 Mount`: Specify which side to mount your P20 Multi Channel Pipette. ---
6ul of solution is transferred from column 1 of the source plate to the destination plate.
materials_raw: NEST 2 mL 96-Well Deep Well Plate, V Bottom
